column17: Chart Designer: Dr. Thomas R. Nicely

column2: 1983: The Vikings were 7-2 to start the season. However,  the Vikings would lose their next 6 games as their playoff hopes fizzled under a rash of injuries. The Vikings won their final game against the Cincinnati Bengals 20-14 at the Metrodome. Following the 1983 season Coach Bud Grant would retire, and was replaced by Les Steckel.

column1: 3 Includes positive “T1,” “T2” and “T3” yardage (expected values = 27.5, 55 and 82.5, respectively).
